ocr_findings.description: 伝達経路 table: イメージ row cells contain person-icon network diagrams. OCR renders these as '8——8' placeholder strings rather than meaningful content. The table headers (メンバー数/伝達経路数: 2/3/4 with values 1/3/6) are correctly captured, so the numerical data is intact.

Bottom section 伝達経路の数の算出方法 diagram showing 5-person, 6-person, 7-person fully-connected networks replaced by image placeholder img-0.jpeg. The diagram illustrates the counting method described in surrounding text.

reviewer_notes: Page 263 covers 伝達経路の計算問題. The key numerical data (member counts and path counts) is captured correctly. The icon-based table イメージ row is unreadable but non-critical since values are in the row above. The network diagrams at bottom are explanatory visuals adequately described in surrounding prose.
